query:
SELECT '道具' as type, rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(shop_price) as min_price, MAX(shop_price) as max_price, AVG(shop_price) as avg_price FROM game_item_catalog WHERE is_active=1 GROUP BY rarity
UNION ALL
SELECT '裝備' as type, rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(shop_price) as min_price, MAX(shop_price) as max_price, AVG(shop_price) as avg_price FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE is_active=1 GROUP BY rarity
UNION ALL
SELECT '技能' as type, rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(shop_price) as min_price, MAX(shop_price) as max_price, AVG(shop_price) as avg_price FROM game_skill_catalog WHERE is_active=1 GROUP BY rarity;

UNION ALL
